text.title: Ideation Methods: SCAMPER, Mind Mapping, Starbursting Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing 6 SCAMPER lenses; subject too vague.

list.item: SCAMPER output missing any of the 7 lenses.
Starbursting matrix missing any of {who, what, where, when, why, how}.
